title: Online experimentation for ML + DSA 1-D DP finish
focus: A/B for models vs UI; shadow / canary / interleaving / off-policy.

items.label: Longest Increasing Subsequence
interviewQuestions: Walk through DP O(n²). Then walk through patience-sorting O(n log n) with binary search.
What's the DIFFERENCE between LIS length and the actual subsequence — how do you reconstruct?

items.label: Partition Equal Subset Sum
interviewQuestions: State the DP: define the state, the transition, and the base case explicitly.
Top-down (memoized recursion) vs bottom-up (tabulation) — which is more natural here, and why?
Can you space-optimize from O(n) to O(1)? Show the rolling-window trick.

items.label: A/B testing for models: lift, guardrails, ramp
interviewQuestions: How is A/B testing a model different from A/B testing a UI feature?
What guardrail metrics do you track on every model launch?

items.label: Canary, shadow, interleaving
interviewQuestions: When does interleaving beat A/B for ranking systems?
What's the smallest canary slice that's still statistically meaningful for a ranking model?

items.label: Counterfactual & off-policy evaluation
interviewQuestions: What is off-policy evaluation, and where does it show up in recommender systems?
Compare IPS vs doubly-robust off-policy estimators — when does each fall apart?
